storeOs.cloudCompatibility: PARTIAL — core env var validation runs in both modes. In cloud mode, config is read from trigger input smoke_test_config instead of process.env. Filesystem path existence checks (STORE_OS_PROJECT_ROOT, STORE_OS_AJV_SCHEMA_PATH) are self-hosted only and skipped in cloud mode. cloud_mode: true is set in the returned runtime config.
storeOs.note: This workflow validates env vars and assembles the runtime config. It does not validate n8n credential store existence — that requires n8n-internal access not available from Code nodes.
